About

The Art
Behind the Brush

With over a decade of experience and training at leading academies in Paris and Mumbai, I specialize in curating bespoke bridal looks that honor each woman's unique beauty.

From timeless classics to contemporary editorial — every look I create is built on luxury hypoallergenic products ensuring flawless, photo-ready skin that lasts through ceremonies, tears, and endless dancing.

"Every bride deserves to feel as beautiful on the outside as she does on the inside."

Bridal Specialist HD Airbrush Luxury Products Destination Ready

Love Notes

What Brides
Say

Priya didn't just do my makeup — she understood exactly what I wanted. I've never felt more beautiful. The makeup lasted 14 hours without a single touch-up.

Ananya Mehta

Wedding · March 2026

From the trial to the wedding day, Priya was an absolute professional. My skin looked flawless in every photo. She's a magician with an airbrush!

Kavya Patel

Reception · February 2026

I was nervous about my destination wedding makeup, but Priya traveled with us and made sure every look was perfect across three events. Absolutely worth every penny.

Riya Kapoor

Destination Wedding · January 2026

Pricing &
Packages

Custom quotes available for destination weddings and bridal parties

✦ Pricing includes travel within city limits. Destination weddings and outstation events quoted separately. Custom packages available.
